members.name: GetPlaybackPosition
members.summary: Returns the position in the [AudioStream].

members.name: GetStreamPlayback
members.summary: Returns the [AudioStreamPlayback] object associated with this [AudioStreamPlayer2D].

members.name: HasStreamPlayback
members.summary: Returns whether the [AudioStreamPlayer] can return the [AudioStreamPlayback] object or not.

members.name: Play
members.summary: Queues the audio to play on the next physics frame, from the given position [param from_position], in seconds.

members.name: Seek
members.summary: Sets the position from which audio will be played, in seconds.

members.name: Stop
members.summary: Stops the audio.

members.name: AreaMask
members.summary: Determines which [Area2D] layers affect the sound for reverb and audio bus effects. Areas can be used to redirect [AudioStream]s so that they play in a certain audio bus. An example of how you might use this is making a "water" area so that sounds played in the water are redirected through an audio bus to make them sound like they are being played underwater.

members.name: Attenuation
members.summary: The volume is attenuated over distance with this as an exponent.

members.name: Autoplay
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], audio plays when added to scene tree.

members.name: Bus
members.summary: Bus on which this audio is playing. [b]Note:[/b] When setting this property, keep in mind that no validation is performed to see if the given name matches an existing bus. This is because audio bus layouts might be loaded after this property is set. If this given name can't be resolved at runtime, it will fall back to [code]"Master"[/code].

members.name: MaxDistance
members.summary: Maximum distance from which audio is still hearable.

members.name: MaxPolyphony
members.summary: The maximum number of sounds this node can play at the same time. Playing additional sounds after this value is reached will cut off the oldest sounds.

members.name: PanningStrength
members.summary: Scales the panning strength for this node by multiplying the base [member ProjectSettings.audio/general/2d_panning_strength] with this factor. Higher values will pan audio from left to right more dramatically than lower values.

members.name: PitchScale
members.summary: The pitch and the tempo of the audio, as a multiplier of the audio sample's sample rate.

members.name: PlaybackType
members.summary: The playback type of the stream player. If set other than to the default value, it will force that playback type.

members.name: Playing
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], audio is playing or is queued to be played (see [method play]).

members.name: Stream
members.summary: The [AudioStream] object to be played.

members.name: StreamPaused
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], the playback is paused. You can resume it by setting [member stream_paused] to [code]false[/code].

members.name: VolumeDb
members.summary: Base volume before attenuation, in decibels.

members.name: VolumeLinear
members.summary: Base volume before attenuation, as a linear value. [b]Note:[/b] This member modifies [member volume_db] for convenience. The returned value is equivalent to the result of [method @GlobalScope.db_to_linear] on [member volume_db]. Setting this member is equivalent to setting [member volume_db] to the result of [method @GlobalScope.linear_to_db] on a value.

signals.name: Finished
signals.summary: Emitted when the audio stops playing.
